Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I must file a report with the Kirijo Group...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}The formatting is tricky... I'll have to do some research.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems busy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I doubt she's in the mood[n]to go to the movies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}With Amada on our team, we have more manpower.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although he's still a child...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like there's something[n]on Mitsuru's mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I doubt she's in the mood[n]to go to the movies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}I haven't had a free day in some time, but it's here at last.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's inevitable when one has a month off that there will be at least one day with a clear schedule.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems to be free today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I invite Mitsuru to the film festival?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I just remembered that I received VIP tickets from a distributor...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}...I think I'll make use of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've only ever seen employee previews before... I've never had a chance to see a movie start to finish before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sorry about all the extra attention we got because of my VIP tickets...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4038 0 0}Anyway, thank you for inviting me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}I have plans today. I'll be back before it's dark, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}Keeping busy with work suits me more than being idle. I found it hard to pass time yesterday since I had nothing to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}So I decided to take a nap... which actually gave me a headache.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems busy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I doubt she's in the mood[n]to go to the movies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}
